subcodes.first_line: O servant at the sacred Threshold! The letter, rich in content and eloquent in expression, hath reached this wanderer in the wilderness of God's love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه خوش مضمون و فصیح العباره باین آواره صحرای محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @poems and quotation from poetry
